summary: Full feature-set verification for notifications, hashtags, reports + admin moderation, AI moderation (Claude lenient), sponsored whispers, and Stripe boost checkout. Backend pytest: 16/16 passing on new feature suite. Existing backend regression suite untouched. Frontend Playwright: all 10 critical steps green — admin login, notif bell + dropdown, admin link visibility (admin sees, non-admin does not), /editor panel with both tabs, hashtag rendering + navigation, report dialog on other users' whispers, and boost button on own whisper redirecting to a real https://checkout.stripe.com/c/pay/cs_test_... URL (no actual payment completed).

issues: Console hydration warning: 'In HTML, <a> cannot be a descendant of <a>'. Cause: WhisperCard wraps content in a <Link to=/fisilti/:id>, and inside it <HashtagText> renders #tags as <Link to=/etiket/:tag>. Nested <a> tags violate HTML semantics. Suggested fix: replace the outer <Link> with an onClick navigation div (or wrap only the non-hashtag spans in the link), so hashtag links remain valid. Functionally still works (stopPropagation on the inner link).
Carried over from previous iterations: GET /api/auth/me still emits two 401 console errors on initial anonymous load. Cosmetic only.

action_items: (Optional) Fix nested <a> in <a> warning in WhisperCard.jsx + HashtagText.jsx — switch the outer Link to a click-driven container, or render hashtags as <button>/<span role=link> with programmatic navigate(). Functionality is unaffected today, but React will eventually throw a hydration error.
(Cosmetic) The initial anonymous GET /api/auth/me 401s could be suppressed by checking for a session_token cookie before firing the call.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 1158 lines — exceeds the 700-line guideline. Recommend splitting into routers/modules (auth.py, whispers.py, notifications.py, admin.py, boost.py, moderation.py).
moderate_content() correctly falls back to allowed=True on any exception or missing key — verified in tests with benign Turkish gossip approved.
Boost ownership check is enforced (POST /api/boost/checkout returns 403 for non-owner) — verified.
GET /api/boost/status/{session_id} correctly returns non-'paid' before checkout completion; whisper.is_boosted stays false — verified.
SponsoredWhisperCreate enforces sponsor_name min_length=2 — good. Sponsored whispers appear pinned at top of /api/whispers feed — verified.
Admin moderation hide/approve/delete all working; hidden whispers are excluded from /api/whispers but still resolve via /api/whispers/{id} when not deleted — confirmed.
Hashtag extraction (Turkish-aware regex) produces lowercase, deduplicated, order-preserving list — verified.

success_rate.backend: 100% (16/16 new feature tests; previous 30 backend_test.py tests not re-run this iteration but unchanged)

test_credentials: admin@fisilti.com / Admin1234! and muhabir1@fisilti.com / Test1234! — both verified working. Tests also self-create TEST_*@fisilti.com users via /api/auth/register.
seed_data_creation: Tests create their own TEST_-prefixed users and whispers per run; no manual seeding needed. The preview DB already had seeded gossip whispers from iteration_1.
context_for_next_testing_agent: New feature endpoints to remember: GET/POST /api/notifications, /api/notifications/read, /api/notifications/unread_count, GET /api/hashtags/trending, ?hashtag= filter on /api/whispers, POST /api/whispers/{id}/report, GET /api/admin/reports, POST /api/admin/whispers/{id}/moderate (action: hide/approve/delete), POST /api/admin/whispers/sponsored (requires sponsor_name min 2 chars + content min 10 chars), GET /api/boost/packages (boost_24h, 25 TRY, 24h), POST /api/boost/checkout (whisper_id, package_id='boost_24h', origin_url), GET /api/boost/status/{session_id}. Stripe redirect URL form: https://checkout.stripe.com/c/pay/cs_test_... — DO NOT actually complete payment. Frontend testids: notif-bell-btn, notif-dropdown, notif-empty, masthead-admin-link, admin-panel-page, admin-tab-reports, admin-tab-sponsored, sponsored-form, report-dialog, report-submit-btn, report-cancel-btn, whisper-report-btn-<id>, hashtag-link-<tag>, hashtag-feed-page, detail-boost-btn, detail-boost-active. Known cosmetic console warning: nested <a> inside <a> from WhisperCard's outer Link + HashtagText inner Link.
rca of the issue: N/A — feature addition validation, no bugs blocking. Only one cosmetic React hydration warning surfaced (nested anchors); functionality unaffected.
